sentences.arabic: فِي سُوقِ الْعَمَلِ التَّنَافُسِيِّ، لَمْ يَعُدِ الِاعْتِمَادُ عَلَى الشَّهَادَاتِ الْأَكَادِيمِيَّةِ وَحْدَهَا كَافِيًا.
sentences.translation: Na konkurentnom tržištu rada, oslanjanje samo na akademske diplome više nije dovoljno.
sentences.translationEn: In the competitive labor market, relying on academic degrees alone is no longer sufficient.

sentences.arabic: بَاتَ مِنَ الضَّرُورِيِّ اكْتِسَابُ مَهَارَاتٍ نَاعِمَةٍ مِثْلَ الذَّكَاء الْعَاطِفِيِّ وَحَلِّ الْمُشْكِلَاتِ الْمُعَقَّدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Postalo je neophodno steći meke vještine poput emocionalne inteligencije i rješavanja složenih problema.
sentences.translationEn: It has become necessary to acquire soft skills such as emotional intelligence and complex problem solving.

sentences.arabic: التَّعَلُّمُ الْمُسْتَمِرُّ هُوَ الضَّمَانُ الْوَحِيدُ لِلْبَقَاءِ فِي الطَّلِيعَةِ وَمُوَاكَبَةِ التَّغَيُّرَاتِ الْمِهْنِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Kontinuirano učenje je jedina garancija za ostanak u vrhu i praćenje profesionalnih promjena.
sentences.translationEn: Continuous learning is the only guarantee to stay at the forefront and keep pace with professional changes.

sentences.arabic: يَسْعَى الْمُحْتَرِفُونَ دَائِمًا لِتَوْسِيعِ شَبَكَةِ عَلَاقَاتِهِمْ لِتَبَادُلِ الْخِبْرَاتِ وَالْمَعْرِفَةِ.
sentences.translation: Profesionalci uvijek teže proširenju svoje mreže kontakata radi razmjene iskustava i znanja.
sentences.translationEn: Professionals always strive to expand their network of relationships to exchange experiences and knowledge.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الِاسْتِثْمَارَ فِي الذَّاتِ يُؤَدِّي حَتْمًا إِلَى فَتْحِ آفَاقٍ جَدِيدَةٍ لِلرُّقِيِّ الْوَظِيفِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Ulaganje u sebe neizbježno vodi ka otvaranju novih horizonata za napredovanje u karijeri.
sentences.translationEn: Investing in oneself inevitably leads to opening new horizons for career advancement.
